objective: Build and stabilize an AI-driven backend system with execution engine, policy selection, learning loop, metrics tracking, and resilience, and prepare it for deployment without adding new features
decisions: Replace UPDATE-only metrics logic with INSERT ... ON CONFLICT to ensure policy_metrics rows are created and updated
Standardize JSON handling using json.dumps instead of str(dict) for PostgreSQL compatibility
Use CAST(:action AS JSONB) for JSON comparison in SQL queries
Fix duplicate policy detection using JSONB-safe comparison
Unify learning pipeline through learning_orchestrator and ignore duplicate orchestrator paths
Defer all advanced intelligence features (evolution, adaptive scoring, multi-agent optimization) to POST-MVP backlog
Create POST_MVP_BACKLOG.md to externalize future phases and prevent scope drift
Lock system scope to stabilization only (Phase 7.4) without introducing new architecture or features
Ensure fallback policy always returns valid structure instead of None
Fix executor error handling to prevent undefined variables (error_msg issue)
Remove debug print statements and use structured logging
Focus on deployment readiness instead of further intelligence improvements

built_components.details: executor.py handles job execution, policy selection, metrics update, and triggers learning cycle
policy_engine.py performs policy selection using scoring and conflict resolution
scoring.py computes scores using metrics such as success_rate and latency
feedback.py and feedback_collector.py update policy_metrics table using upsert logic
pattern_extractor.py extracts structured patterns from policy_metrics
policy_generator.py generates new policies based on extracted patterns
policy_validator.py filters and validates generated policies
learning_orchestrator.py runs full pipeline: patterns → generate → validate → insert into DB
/job endpoint accepts job requests and triggers execution
RQ queues (high, default, low, dead) manage job processing and retries

inputs: HTTP POST /job with payload containing type and data
Agent type and state passed to policy engine
Database records from policies and policy_metrics tables
outputs: Generated and inserted policies into policies table
dependencies: PostgreSQL (data storage for policies and metrics)
notes: System is functionally complete at MVP level: execution, policy engine, metrics, learning pipeline, and persistence are operational. Learning cycle verified with patterns, generated policies, and DB insertion. Remaining work is stabilization (Phase 7.4): executor error handling, logging cleanup, API validation, worker load stability, and health endpoint. Advanced intelligence (evolution, adaptive scoring, multi-agent logic) explicitly deferred to POST-MVP phases.
